A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed a set of publications cited by UNIV CALIFORNIA patents (from query_db:16 and execute_python:20/26) and then incorrectly treated any patent citing those same publications as “citing UNIV CALIFORNIA” (execute_python:30), leading to the wrong assignees and CPC titles.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent used a generally correct approach but implemented it incorrectly—most visibly in execute_python:44 where it extracted CPC subclasses from all CPC entries (via a regex on codes) rather than the primary ones (ignoring the "first" flag) and relied on brittle regexes to parse assignees and UC publication numbers, resulting in only three citing assignees and missing many ground-truth cases.

@@
